# Beehiiv 2026 Revenue Roadmap and Creator Payout Data

## Summary

Practitioner-sourced breakdown of Beehiiv's 2025 performance and 2026 targets, including creator payout data, ad network eligibility requirements, and the unified Earnings dashboard rollout planned for 2026. Published January 2026.

## Platform stats 2025 vs 2026

| Metric | 2025 Performance | 2026 Target |
|---|---|---|
| Total Platform Revenue | $28 Million | $50 Million |
| Monthly Creator Payouts | $1 Million | $3 Million |
| Paid Subscription Revenue | $19 Million | Growing |
| Emails Sent on Platform | 28 Billion | Projected Higher |
| Unique Readers Reached | 255 Million | Projected Higher |
| Average Open Rate | 41%+ | Maintained |
| Median Days to First Dollar | 66 Days | Shortening |

## Ad Network eligibility (2026 confirmed requirements)

- Minimum **1,000 active subscribers** (baseline, not guarantee)
- Consistent **open rate of 20%+** (below this threshold = focus on list hygiene first)
- List grown through legitimate methods (purchased lists/imported cold lists = flagged)
- Available on all paid plans; access is reviewed, not automatic

## Active advertisers in Beehiiv network (confirmed Q1 2026)

Notion, Google, Netflix, HubSpot, Deel, Roku

## Creator payout note

- "This is passive income. You turn it on. Brands appear in your newsletter. Beehiiv handles every part of the sales and delivery process."
- Individual payouts vary by niche, subscriber count, open rate
- Finance/B2B/investing newsletters: significantly higher CPMs than general interest

## 2026 platform update: unified Earnings dashboard

- Ad Network, Boosts, and Paid Subscriptions will be managed from a single unified Earnings dashboard
- "Switch between promoting a brand and promoting a fellow creator with one click"

## Annotations for stinger-forge

- The unified Earnings dashboard update is a 2026 change that should be flagged in `guides/03-monetization.md`.
- The "$1M/month target to $3M/month" trajectory confirms Beehiiv is investing heavily in the ad network side.
- The open rate threshold (20%+) for ad network eligibility is the first deliverability target a new creator must hit before monetization kicks in.
- The "list hygiene before applying" advice (remove subscribers who haven't opened in 90 days) is practical guidance for the deliverability guide.
- For the monetization guide, the four revenue streams in priority order for a new creator: (1) Boosts (lowest friction, no minimum), (2) Ad Network (1,000 subs + 20% open rate), (3) Paid Subscriptions (requires audience trust), (4) Direct Sponsorships (requires 5,000+ subs for inbound).
